---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement

---

## Description

A clear description of the feature or improvement you'd like.

## Motivation

Why is this feature valuable? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you think this could be implemented, if you have ideas.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or examples here.
